issues.detail: The skill file does not cover error handling or edge cases in its examples.

scenarios.name: Real-time pending-order listener with change types
scenarios.rationale: Baseline used onSnapshot but iterated snapshot.forEach without docChanges branching; treatment used docChanges() to differentiate added/modified/removed and exposed an unsubscribe handle.

scenarios.name: Atomic balance transfer + composite index
scenarios.rationale: Baseline used @firestore.transactional but omitted the insufficient-funds guard and the composite firestore.indexes.json entry; treatment included both and added the firebase deploy command.
